ddls:
CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the game version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game version */,
  "game_platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the game version was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location area */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location area */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location area is located */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., route, cave, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encounter_slots" (
  "encounter_slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter slot */,
  "encounter_slot_name" TEXT /* Name of the encounter slot */,
  "encounter_type" TEXT /* Type of encounter (e.g., grass, cave, water) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon species */,
  "pokemon_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon species */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the Pokémon species */,
  "evolution_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the Pokémon evolves */,
  "evolved_from" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species from which this Pokémon evolves */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encounters" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game version */,
  "location_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location area */,
  "encounter_slot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encounter slot */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species */,
  "min_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level of the Pokémon */,
  "max_level" INTEGER /* Maximum level of the Pokémon */,
  "encounter_rate" REAL /* Encounter rate */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the encounter (e.g., common, rare, legendary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounters_location_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_area_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounters_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounters_encounter_slot_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_slot_id") REFERENCES encounter_slots ("encounter_slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encounter_rates" (
  "encounter_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter rate */,
  "location_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location area */,
  "encounter_slot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encounter slot */,
  "rate" REAL /* Encounter rate */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day for the encounter rate (e.g., morning, noon, night) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounter_rates_encounter_slot_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_slot_id") REFERENCES encounter_slots ("encounter_slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounter_rates_location_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_area_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "level_distributions" (
  "level_distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level distribution */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the Pokémon */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the level */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of the Pokémon (e.g., fast, medium, slow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_distributions_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, contributor) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of user registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encounter being contributed to */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., edit, addition, deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_encounter_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_id") REFERENCES encounters ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., encounter rate, level distribution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., encounter rate, level distribution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the feedback (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "glossary" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)
